pages.title: Engineering Projects
pages.summary: Engineering projects, test facilities and thruster development.

sections.heading: Intro
sections.text: Hello, I'm Ollie and this is where I share a selection of my engineering projects from over the years. Links to LinkedIn, ResearchGate, ORCID, X.

sections.heading: GAUSS (Rocket Lab)
sections.text: Key member of the team developing an in-house hall-effect thruster. Lead Test Engineer. Responsible Engineer for vacuum test facility.

sections.heading: PhD Viva Presentation
sections.text: Recording of PhD viva presentation 'Performance Increase of Electron Cyclotron Resonance Magnetic Nozzle Thruster'

sections.heading: Large ECR Thruster
sections.text: Developed an Electron Cyclotron Resonance (ECR) Magnetic Nozzle thruster with improved thrust and efficiency.

pages.title: Research Publications
pages.summary: Journal articles, conference proceedings, PhD thesis and patent information.

sections.heading: Journal Articles
sections.text: Effect of Magnetic Field Strength Gradient on ECR Magnetic Nozzle Thruster Performance.

sections.heading: Conference Proceedings
sections.text: Multiple conference papers on ECR magnetic nozzle thrusters and performance studies.

sections.heading: Ph.D. Thesis
sections.text: PhD thesis: Performance increase of electron cyclotron resonance magnetic nozzle thruster via magnetically thickened resonance region.

pages.title: EP Video Archive
pages.summary: An archive of electric propulsion hot-fire and on-orbit videos across multiple categories.

sections.heading: In-Space Hot Fires
sections.text: On-orbit ignition videos of several hall effect thrusters including JW-200, SPT-70 and SPS-25.

sections.heading: Hall Effect Thrusters
sections.text: Vacuum chamber and test rig videos for GAUSS, X3, PPS-1350 and others.

sections.heading: Gridded Ion Thrusters
sections.text: RF gridded ion thruster test videos including AURA and RIT-2X.
